name: LinkedIn
description: Search for people, browse profiles, and explore professional content on LinkedIn

user_stories.i_want: to search for people with specific skills or job titles
user_stories.so_that: I can find candidates for open positions

user_stories.i_want: to browse my LinkedIn feed for industry updates
user_stories.so_that: I stay connected with my professional network

user_stories.i_want: to view a company's profile and recent posts
user_stories.so_that: I can research potential employers before applying
